title: Removing the RawInput from the API output
body:
Including the RawInput in the API output is meaningless.

Fixes: #16497

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Toshiki Sonoda <sonoda.toshiki@fujitsu.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
@sstosh How about:
```diff
$ git diff
diff --git a/pkg/domain/entities/reports/containers.go b/pkg/domain/entities/reports/containers.go
index 6759fc402..6ccbc9a62 100644
--- a/pkg/domain/entities/reports/containers.go
+++ b/pkg/domain/entities/reports/containers.go
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ package reports
 type RmReport struct {
        Id       string `json:"Id"` //nolint:revive,stylecheck
        Err      error  `json:"Err,omitempty"`
-       RawInput string
+       RawInput string `json:"-"`
 }
 
 func RmReportsIds(r []*RmReport) []string {
```
Which should make it not be included in the API output?

> 
> Which should make it not be included in the API output?

Thank you for your reply.
I think removing the `RawInput` from the API output is a better way.
I'll fix it.

```diff
diff --git a/pkg/domain/entities/reports/containers.go b/pkg/domain/entities/reports/containers.go
index 6759fc402..6ccbc9a62 100644
--- a/pkg/domain/entities/reports/containers.go
+++ b/pkg/domain/entities/reports/containers.go
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ package reports
 type RmReport struct {
        Id       string `json:"Id"` //nolint:revive,stylecheck
        Err      error  `json:"Err,omitempty"`
-       RawInput string
+       RawInput string `json:"-"`
 }
```

This change removes the RawInput from the API output.

```
# podman create --name test quay.io/libpod/testimage:20220615
50d1b9cf901760b26e29c90f206322e10c9821462b48fdd2449806708624494e
# curl -X DELETE --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock http://d/v4.3.0/libpod/containers/test
[{"Id":"50d1b9cf901760b26e29c90f206322e10c9821462b48fdd2449806708624494e"}]
```

However, `podman-remote rm` prints not the RawInput but the full Container ID.
Therefore, e2e tests are failed.
I'm thinking about this issue.

```
# podman create --name test quay.io/libpod/testimage:20220615
85a025b70b748667e11a05cc3bfccd725b38728b5d18bb1b528b66b4aee20aa4
# podman-remote rm test
85a025b70b748667e11a05cc3bfccd725b38728b5d18bb1b528b66b4aee20aa4
(Expected: test)
```

> However, podman-remote rm prints not the RawInput but the full Container ID.
> Therefore, e2e tests are failed.
> I'm thinking about this issue.

I resolved this issue.

```
# podman create --name test quay.io/libpod/testimage:20220615
d778222294ce2f98ad6e0f2dc89591380cfe8787f756233ca407756913151186
# curl -X DELETE --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock http://d/v4.3.0/libpod/containers/test
[{"Id":"d778222294ce2f98ad6e0f2dc89591380cfe8787f756233ca407756913151186"}]
```

```
# podman create --name test quay.io/libpod/testimage:20220615
63d17ffe6d22ecaa308c034e7b31db0e95c3def0bd92ef341a702ab140ba7292
# podman-remote rm test
test
```
